d:
Passive. When a battle starts, Evie teleports to the symmetrical tile on the enemy side and enters concealment. While concealed, Evie is [[invincible]] and accumulates [[120]] Detection points every second. She loses [[500]] Detection points each time an ally casts their Ultimate. When her Detection reaches [[1000]], or if all allies are defeated, Evie is revealed and no longer [[invincible]].
As soon as Evie enters concealment, she starts gathering intel on all non-summoned enemies within [[1]] tile. Once complete, she continues investigating the remaining non-summoned enemies one at a time, prioritizing from nearest to farthest based on their starting positions relative to her. Each investigation takes [[4.5]]s, and when it is completed, Evie gains [[150]] Energy.
After gathering intel on all those enemies, Evie teleports back to her original tile and loses her [[invincibility]].
Active. Evie interrogates the enemy with the highest cumulative damage dealt for [[6]]s. During the interrogation, she deals [[180%]]<ATK> damage to the enemy every second and [[immobilizes]] them. If she has already gathered intel on the target, the skill also silences them during the interrogation.
Increases interrogation duration to [[6.5]]s when this skill is used actively.
Increases interrogation duration to [[7]]s when this skill is used actively.
Increases interrogation duration to [[7.5]]s when this skill is used actively.
Increases interrogation duration to [[8]]s when this skill is used actively.

Passive. When Evie finishes gathering intel on an enemy hero, that enemy hero's Magic DEF is permanently reduced by [[20%]]. If she manages to gather intel on all surviving enemy heroes while concealed, the Magic DEF of all enemies is reduced by an extra [[25%]].
Active. Evie dashes to the nearest enemy and strikes them twice with her dagger, dealing [[220%]]<ATK> damage with each hit.
Increases damage dealt to [[230%]]<ATK> when this skill is used actively.
Increases damage dealt to [[240%]]<ATK> when this skill is used actively.
Increases damage dealt to [[250%]]<ATK> when this skill is used actively.

When a battle starts, Evie summons a quill to follow the [[rearmost]] ally. Afterward, every [[3]]s, the quill switches to the ally with the highest cumulative damage dealt, restoring [[120%]]<ATK> HP to them every second and increasing their ATK by [[20%]].
When the ally with the quill has dealt damage equal to [[250%]] of their initial ATK, the quill shoots 1 healing orb at each of the 2 weakest allies other than the ally the quill is following, restoring [[45%]]<ATK> HP to them. The effect can trigger once every [[0.5]]s.
Increases the orb's healing amount to [[50%]]<ATK>.
Increases the orb's healing amount to [[55%]]<ATK>.
Increases the orb's healing amount to [[60%]]<ATK>.
Increases Healing by [[11]] during battle.
Increases Healing by [[15]] during battle.
Increases Healing by [[19]] during battle.

If Evie gathers intel on every surviving enemy hero without being revealed, she shares her findings with her allies. With their weaknesses exposed, these enemies deal [[25%]] less damage for the rest of the battle. In non-boss battles, the duration of dispellable debuffs inflicted on allies by these enemies is also reduced by [[30%]].
Increases the reduction to enemy damage dealt to [[30%]] and the reduction to their debuff durations to [[40%]].
Enemies also take [[25%]] more magic damage after Evie shares her findings with allies.
Increases the reduction to enemy damage dealt to [[35%]] and the reduction to their debuff durations to [[50%]].

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, the first time an ally's HP drops below [[40%]], restores [[160%]]<ATK> HP to them and grants them a shield equal to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Healing, 10 Haste.

d: After gathering intel on all surviving enemy heroes while concealed, Evie summons an extra quill to follow the ally with the second-highest cumulative damage dealt. Each ally can only be followed by one quill.
